instructions.instruction: **Core principle:** Every claimed Rails/Ruby version must be in the CI matrix. Prefer explicit support targets over accidental compatibility.
instructions.original_snippets: **Core principle:** Every claimed Rails/Ruby version must be in the CI matrix. Prefer explicit support targets over accidental compatibility.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger upgrade-engine.

instructions.instruction: CI matrix must pass — not just main Rails version
instructions.original_snippets: CI matrix must pass — not just main Rails version
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger upgrade-engine.

instructions.instruction: Run `bundle exec rake zeitwerk:check` — file paths must match constant names exactly.
instructions.original_snippets: Run `bundle exec rake zeitwerk:check` — file paths must match constant names exactly.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger upgrade-engine.

instructions.instruction: Check initializer behavior across boot and reload — use `config.to_prepare` for reload-sensitive hooks.
instructions.original_snippets: Check initializer behavior across boot and reload — use `config.to_prepare` for reload-sensitive hooks.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger upgrade-engine.

instructions.instruction: Verify gemspec dependency bounds match tested versions: `spec.add_dependency "rails", ">= 7.0", "< 8.0"` — bounds must match what CI actually tests.
instructions.original_snippets: Verify gemspec dependency bounds match tested versions: `spec.add_dependency "rails", ">= 7.0", "< 8.0"` — bounds must match what CI actually tests.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger upgrade-engine.

instructions.instruction: Check optional integrations (jobs, mailers, assets, routes) per version.
instructions.original_snippets: Check optional integrations (jobs, mailers, assets, routes) per version.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger upgrade-engine.
